item.title: Sato Pharmaceutical Inc.: Yunker(branded) Energy & Health Herbal Supplement with Vitamins; Recall
item.product: Yunker(branded) Energy & Health Herbal Supplement with Vitamins;
item.summary: Product does not meet label claim for Vitamin E. Product details: Yunker(branded) Energy & Health Herbal Supplement with Vitamins; Manufactured by Sato Pharmaceuticals Co. Ltd.; 30ml container. Packed in single serving, 3 units/pack, and 10 units per pack. Single UPC: 49873-916-11 3pack UPC: 49873-916-15 10pack UPC: 49873-91...
item.affectedPeople: Product was distributed to two domestic consignees who further distribute nationwide.
item.remedy: Affected quantity: 25,130 units across all package sizes
item.payoutAmount: Refund, replacement, correction, or disposal if stated by the official notice
